prose: The frontier-orbitals of aniline were computed at the DFT level using the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase. The geometry was built from the xyz coordinates in the specified file. The calculation converged with SCF and provided the HOMO (highest occupied molecular orbital) energy at -5.553772 eV and the LUMO (lowest unoccupied molecular orbital) energy at -0.2489544 eV. The resulting orbital gap (HOMO-LUMO gap) is approximately 11.369 eV.
